description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a bold, urban aesthetic, featuring a predominantly black color scheme with dark gray camouflage patterns and white barbed wire graphics wrapping around the upper. The shoe has a thick, sculpted sole that appears durable and supportive, suitable for streetwear or athletic use. The upper is constructed from a mix of synthetic materials, likely including faux leather and mesh, providing both structure and breathability. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style, with black laces running through reinforced eyelets. Notably, the back of the shoe displays a white smiley face logo encircled by barbed wire, adding a distinctive and playful touch. The overall finish is glossy, giving the shoe a sleek and modern appearance.
description: A glossy black high-top sneaker with dark gray camouflage, white barbed wire graphics, and a smiley face logo on the heel. The shoe features a thick sole and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black and gray camouflage pattern, white barbed wire graphics, and the sculpted sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross lacing and the rounded toe area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar camouflage and barbed wire details, emphasizing the shoe's high-top structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the white smiley face logo encircled by barbed wire on the heel.
attribute_logo: white smiley face encircled by barbed wire on the heel
